tools.description: Use when the user has a video_id and wants ad spend, ROAS, play, engagement, follower, and commerce performance over a date range.

video_id.description: Video ID; use video_search first if only a title/creator is known.

tools.name: ad_data_overview

tools.description: Use when the user wants active ad creatives or needs to filter ads by country, category, landing page, spend, ROAS, plays, or run days. Returns ad, creator, shop, products, and performance sections.

ad_type.description: Ad type: 1 TikTok Shop commerce ad, 2 non-commerce/planting ad.

estimated_ad_spend_range.description: Estimated ad spend range in the form {"min": number, "max": number}.

keywords.description: Search keywords for ad caption, product, creator, or shop clues.

last_seen_ad_date_range.description: Last-seen ad date range in the form {"start_date": "YYYY-MM-DD", "end_date": "YYYY-MM-DD"}.

observed_active_days_range.description: Range for the number of days the ad was observed as active, in the form {"min": number, "max": number}.

play_count_range.description: Video play-count range in the form {"min": number, "max": number}.

region.description: Country or region code where the ad is detected, e.g. US, ID, VN.

roas_range.description: ROAS range in the form {"min": number, "max": number}.

video_create_date_range.description: Video publish-date range in the form {"start_date": "YYYY-MM-DD", "end_date": "YYYY-MM-DD"}.

field.description: Sort field: last_seen_ad_date, first_seen_ad_date, play_count, estimated_ad_spend, roas, units_sold, gmv, or observed_active_days.

order.description: Sort direction: asc or desc. Default desc.
